summary: Iteration 7 testing complete: All responsive issues verified as FIXED. Heatmap page summary cards stack to 1 column on mobile (grid-cols-1) and show 3 columns on desktop (sm:grid-cols-3). Calendar grid gap reduces on mobile (gap-1 = 4px) and increases on desktop (sm:gap-2 = 8px). Day headers use abbreviated single letters (D,S,T,Q,Q,S,S). No horizontal overflow at 390px viewport. Investment/Financing/Goal modals all use max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] sm:max-w-md and form fields stack to 1 column on mobile (grid-cols-1) and show 2 columns on desktop (sm:grid-cols-2).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
Console hydration warnings about span inside select - cosmetic, does not affect functionality
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Heatmap: Mobile (390px) - Summary cards stack to 1 column (gridTemplateColumns: '366px')
Heatmap: Mobile (390px) - Calendar grid gap is 4px (gap-1)
Heatmap: Mobile (390px) - Month/year selector fits within viewport
Heatmap: Desktop (1920px) - Summary cards show 3 columns (gridTemplateColumns: '526.656px 526.672px 526.672px')
Heatmap: Desktop (1920px) - Calendar grid gap is 8px (gap-2)
Heatmap: Desktop (1920px) - Day headers are abbreviated single letters: ['D', 'S', 'T', 'Q', 'Q', 'S', 'S']
Investment Modal: Mobile (390px) - Modal fits within viewport (width: 358px, max-width: 358px = calc(100vw-2rem))
Investment Modal: Mobile (390px) - Form fields stack to 1 column (gridTemplateColumns: '308px')
Investment Modal: Desktop (1920px) - Form fields show 2 columns (gridTemplateColumns: '191px 191px')
Financing Modal: Mobile (390px) - Modal fits within viewport (width: 358px)
Financing Modal: Mobile (390px) - Form fields stack to 1 column (both grids show gridTemplateColumns: '308px')
Financing Modal: Desktop (1920px) - Form fields show 2 columns (both grids show gridTemplateColumns: '191px 191px')
Goal Modal: Mobile (390px) - Modal fits within viewport (width: 358px)
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive implementation is correct - uses Tailwind breakpoints (sm:) properly
Heatmap summary cards use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 correctly
Calendar grid uses gap-1 sm:gap-2 correctly
Day headers use abbreviated single letters (D,S,T,Q,Q,S,S)
All modals use max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] sm:max-w-md for proper mobile width
Modal form grids use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 for responsive field layout
test_credentials: Created temporary test user (test-user-responsive-*) for dashboard testing - cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test user with session for responsiveness testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified all responsive fixes: (1) Heatmap summary cards use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3; (2) Calendar grid uses gap-1 sm:gap-2; (3) Day headers are single letters; (4) All modals (Investment, Financing, Goal) use max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] sm:max-w-md; (5) Modal form grids use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2. All tests passed at both 390px mobile and 1920px desktop viewports.
